response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong web/backend background, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and primary expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership or distributed-systems infrastructure work at the scale required.
strengths: Long, varied engineering career with full-stack and systems exposure
Mentoring and teaching experience via workshops, courses, and dojos
Some low-latency, high-throughput service work at Dunnhumby (DLang microservices)
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience (only ~6 months at NI)
No evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed infrastructure leadership
No formal technical lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers in production cloud architecture
